title: Package Policy
description: Schema for package.json consistency rules across the monorepo

scripts.description: Scripts that MUST exist with the exact declared value in every publishable package

optionalScripts.description: Scripts that MAY be omitted (allowlist entry required) but MUST match the declared value when present

workspaceDependencySpec.description: Expected spec for intra-workspace dependencies (e.g., workspace:*)

catalogDependencies.description: Dependency name -> required catalog reference. Any package using a direct version of these is a violation

allowlist.description: Intentional exceptions. Each entry requires a human-readable reason.

rule.description: Rule identifier being exempted (e.g., optionalScripts.test, extraScript, directDependency)

fieldPath.description: Optional: specific field path for extraScript/directDependency exemptions
